system.notes:
Type: Stimulant · Strength (drug power rating, design system pg.124): +1 · Difficulty (to synthesize): 20 · Cost: 1000eb · Duration: 1D6+1 minutes.

The second generation, synthetic replacement for cocaine. Like the original, its side effects are nasty: paranoia, psychological addiction.

Wiring note (Cyberpunk 2020 2nd ed. pg.122): the entry prints no mechanical effect at all — “Strength: +1” is the drug-design power rating (pg.124), not a stat bonus, and its Difficulty 20 does not uniquely decode to Effects-Table components, so nothing is derivable without inventing. Paranoia / psychological addiction are GM-run prose. Addiction is the universal core save (1D10 higher than Body Type; pg.124–125). Manufacturer: not printed.

mechDrug.note: 2nd-gen synthetic cocaine (stimulant); no printed mechanical effect.
